Home › Math › Days Between Dates

📅 Days Between Dates Calculator

Calculate the exact number of days, weeks and months between any two dates instantly.

Enter the two dates

What is this calculator for?

This date calculator computes the exact difference between two dates in days, weeks and months. It is useful for counting down to an event, calculating how long a project has been running, or finding the number of working days between two dates.

Frequently asked questions

Does it account for leap years?

Yes, the calculation is exact and automatically accounts for leap years.

Can I calculate days in the past?

Yes, you can calculate how many days have passed since any past date by entering that date as the start date and today as the end date.

What are working days?

Working days are Monday through Friday, excluding weekends. This calculator does not account for public holidays.
